title: coreopsis multifida
intro: Coreopsis multifida, also known as Cutleaf Coreopsis, is a perennial wildflower native to eastern North America, characterized by its delicate, fern-like foliage and vibrant yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Coreopsis multifida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by drying the flowers and leaves or infusing them in oil or water.
